ItacPersonItem.Notes: Physician, and professor of medicine at the University of Padua between 1688 and 1708. He joined the Ricovrati Academy in 1692, was secretary of the Academy between 1698 and 1700.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
